title: Debugging Strategies
description: Master breakpoints, stack traces, watch variables, memory dumps, and address sanitizers.
learningObjectives: Navigate Visual Studio debugger options (step-over, step-into, step-out)
Inspect local variable register values and evaluate stack frames
Analyze crash dump files to trace memory leak sources

sections.title: Breakpoints and Call Stack Inspection
sections.content: Debugging allows you to suspend process execution and examine state variables. A Breakpoint halts execution on a line. The Call Stack pane lists all active nested function returns. Inspecting these is crucial for tracing how a null pointer was passed into a subsystem. Address Sanitizers (ASan) are compiler options instrumenting binary files to immediately throw exceptions on memory out-of-bound errors.

sections.title: Inspecting Variable Watch States
